name: Volcano Hybrid Tube Kit
summary: The new Volcano Hybrid includes an exclusive function for direct inhalation through a tube.
description: The new Volcano Hybrid includes an exclusive function for direct inhalation through a tube. For those who prefer using the tube for their Volcano Hybrid experience, keeping a spare on hand is highly recommended. It's important to note that this kit is specifically designed for use with the Volcano Hybrid, and offers an awesome feature for direct pull through the tube. If you frequently use your Volcano Hybrid with a tube, it's always a good idea to have an extra one on hand. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
